title: Instrument of the Bards, Ollamh Harp

# Instrument of the Bards, Ollamh Harp

An Instrument of the Bards is superior to an ordinary instrument in every way. Seven types of these instruments exist, each named after a bard college. A creature that attempts to play the instrument without being attuned to it must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or take 2d4 Psychic damage.

You can play the Ollamh Harp to cast one of the following spells: [[fly]], [[invisibility]], [[levitate]], [[protection-from-evil-and-good|Protection from Evil and Good]], [[confusion]], [[control-weather|Control Weather]], and [[fire-storm|Fire Storm]]. Once the Ollamh Harp has been used to cast a spell, it can't be used to cast that spell again until the next dawn. The spells use your spellcasting ability and spell save DC.
